aids.title: Service Models Memory Aid
aids.content:
SPI Stack (bottom to top):
S - SaaS (Software) - 'Someone else does EVERYTHING'
P - PaaS (Platform) - 'Program your app, Platform handles rest'
I - IaaS (Infrastructure) - 'I manage my OS and apps'

Pizza: On-Premise → IaaS → PaaS → SaaS
       Make at home → Take & Bake → Delivered → Restaurant
aids.forRemembering: IaaS vs PaaS vs SaaS differences

aids.title: NIST Definition Keywords
aids.content:
Remember: On-demand, Network access, Shared pool, Configurable, Rapidly provisioned, Minimal management

Acronym: ON-SCRM (On-demand, Network, Shared, Configurable, Rapid, Minimal)
